title: Configure secure access to your workloads using Azure virtual networking
summary: Configure secure access to your workloads using Azure virtual networking. (AZ-1002)

sections.title: Configure secure access to your workloads using Azure virtual networking
sections.summary: Configure secure access to your workloads using Azure virtual networking. (AZ-1002)

lessons.title: Configure virtual networks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure virtual networks and subnets, including IP addressing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-virtual-networks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Virtual Network peering
lessons.content_md:
Learn to configure an Azure Virtual Network peering connection and address transit and connectivity concerns.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-vnet-peering/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage and control traffic flow in your Azure deployment with routes
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to control Azure virtual network traffic by implementing custom routes.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/control-network-traffic-flow-with-routes/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage and control traffic flow in your Azure deployment with routes

lessons.title: Host your domain on Azure DNS
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to host the Domain Name System (DNS) records for your domains on Azure infrastructure by using Azure DNS.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/host-domain-azure-dns/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Host your domain on Azure DNS

lessons.title: Configure network security groups
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement network security groups, and ensure network security group rules are correctly applied.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-network-security-groups/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Firewall
lessons.content_md:
Describe how Azure Firewall protects Azure Virtual Network resources, including the Azure Firewall features, rules, deployment options, and administration with Azure Firewall Manager.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-azure-firewall/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Guided Project - Configure secure access to workloads with Azure virtual networking services
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you practice configuring secure access to workloads using Azure virtual networking. The lab combines both learning and hands-on practice.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-configure-secure-access-workloads/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided Project - Configure secure access to workloads with Azure virtual networking services

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Configure secure access to your workloads using Azure virtual networking
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Configure secure access to your workloads using Azure virtual networking**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
